scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist --clean
scripts.build:worker: node -e "import('tsup').then(({ build }) => build({ entry: { index: 'src/worker.ts' }, format: ['esm'], platform: 'neutral', target: 'es2022', outDir: '../../dist/server', clean: true, splitting: false, minify: true, noExternal: ['@roommates/shared', 'zod'] }))"
